<!--
Copyright (c) 2026 qbitOS / ugrad.ai. All rights reserved.
SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0
-->

# qbitos{erika} Compliance Baseline

## Compliance Root

- Canonical policy: https://github.com/qbitOS/compliance

## Runtime Path

**[qbitOS/qbitos-astro](https://github.com/qbitOS/qbitos-astro)** builds the static site (Freya-parity / Codex / Iron Line hooks). This **qbitos-erika** repo holds **org alignment**, **CI**, and an optional **`site/`** mirror of **`dist/`** for **GitHub Pages** and **erika.qbitos.ai** (Cloudflare Worker → `PAGES_WEB_ORIGIN`).

## Control Envelope

`Upstream source of truth in qbitos-astro / no duplicate product forks here unless documented in UPSTREAM.md / approval gate per docs/deployment (Erika F.) when policy applies`
